content.full_text:
March 11, 2005

Fred Huebscher
The Political Scientists
924 16th Street
Hermosa Beach, CA 90254

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-047

Dear Mr. Huebscher:

This letter confirms the receipt of your March 10, 2005, request for advice regarding an unnamed elected official. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identify the official and are writing as his/her authorized representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission can neither address your questions nor provide analysis. The FPPC may also decline to provide written advice, where an inquiry is hypothetical in nature (regulation 18329(b)(8)(D)).

I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review. We have also added you to our mailing list for interested persons’ notices.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW/rd
